title: [codereview-2] T-Deck gateway WiFi backhaul: missing stack size and TC_TX overrides from Heltec config
description: T-Deck conf now enables WiFi but does not include the NET_TC_TX_COUNT=1, larger LICHEN_LORA_L2_RX_STACK_SIZE, NET_RX/TX_STACK_SIZE from heltec_wifi_lora32_v3_esp32s3_procpu.conf. This may cause deadlocks or stack overflows on border router with RPL and CoAP. Add them to avoid regression. Also add the link epoch persistence and RX1 delay.
